decision: Ambient session indexing — continuous chorus index updates via cron

steps.action: Ambient session indexing — continuous chorus index updates via cron
steps.notes: Ambient indexing shipped — fswatch daemon watches JSONL session files, triggers chorus-index-sessions.sh within 3s. Managed by launchd (com.chorus.session-watcher), survives reboot. Card #140 done.
Verified all 3 claims: fswatch daemon running (PID 68125), launchd plist valid with RunAtLoad+KeepAlive, 3s debounce, lockfile prevents races. Cubicle glance is live.
